rules.statement: Mind layer components MUST NOT contain execution logic such as risk classification, decision-making, caching strategies, or validation enforcement. Mind components only load, parse, and provide query interfaces to .intent/ artifacts.
rules.rationale: Mind is read-only governance interface. Execution logic (risk classification, decision trees, enforcement) belongs in Body layer. This semantic boundary prevents Mind from evolving into an execution layer disguised as governance.

rules.statement: A file under src/mind/** containing structural markers of execution semantics (decision-method names, risk-tier types, allow/deny pattern matching) MUST be flagged as a candidate for execution-semantics review. Pre-selector only — produces no verdict.
rules.rationale: Per ADR-043 D7: the Mind layer has 72 files; LLM verdict across all of them at ~17s/call exceeds the sensor SLA. A regex pre-selector narrows the verdict scope to the ~5-10 files that exhibit execution-y signatures.
